description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a full-length barrel and a robust, synthetic full stock. The barrel is cylindrical and extends forward from the receiver, with a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it. The fore-end is ribbed for grip, indicating its function as a pump mechanism, and the trigger is housed within a rounded, protective trigger guard. The receiver is compact and streamlined, seamlessly connecting the stock and barrel. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments, making it suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A matte black pump-action shotgun with a full stock, ribbed fore-end, and a long cylindrical barrel. The design is utilitarian and streamlined.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, circular muzzle and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the stock, receiver, ribbed pump fore-end, and barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the symmetry of the shotgun's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the full profile and details of the stock, receiver, and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
